title: Authenticate Protected Routes First
guidance: Protected routes must verify identity before business logic executes
do: Return a clear 401 when the caller is unauthenticated
dont: Do not continue into data access or mutations before auth passes

title: Enforce Ownership Checks
guidance: Resource handlers must validate owner_id or user_id before reads or writes
do: Check ownership before mutating or disclosing resource data
dont: Do not trust client-provided identifiers without server-side ownership validation

title: Validate at Trust Boundaries
guidance: Every request should be validated and rejected with explicit client-safe errors when malformed
do: Use schema validation and clear 400 responses for invalid payloads
dont: Do not pass unchecked input into services queries or providers

title: Never Expose Secrets
guidance: Backend responses must never leak tokens secrets or credentials to the client
do: Strip sensitive values from logs and payloads
dont: Do not return provider tokens refresh tokens or hidden credentials in API responses
